desc: Command: Auto-detects and creates appropriate fitting (elbow or tee).
summary: Command: Auto-detects and creates appropriate fitting (elbow or tee). Delegates to MEPSystemAutoFillet which internally uses MEPSystemFillet for elbows and MEPSystemTee for tees. Related: MEPSystemFilletCommand for forced elbow, MatchPipeCentersCommand for alignment only. WORKFLOW: 1. User selects reference pipe 2. User selects target pipe 3. Command checks if reference selection is within 25 mm of unconnected endpoint 4. If within 25 mm: creates elbow fitting (aligns and connects) 5. If beyond 25 mm: creates tee fitting (breaks pipe and inserts tee)
usecase: Smart pipe connections without manual fitting selection. Creating either endpoint or mid-pipe connections. General-purpose pipe connection tool.
notfor: Not for autonomous AI execution. This command requires interactive Revit UI input (dialogs, picks, or manual confirmation).
precondition: Active document must be open. At least two pipes must exist.
postcondition: Appropriate fitting created based on selection proximity. Pipes are connected.
sideeffects: May move target pipe. May break reference pipe (for tee). Creates fitting element.
logictree: check: document.isOpen → continueaction: promptUserToSelectReferencePipe → getReferencePipeaction: promptUserToSelectTargetPipe → getTargetPipecheck: bothPipesValid → continue, else → errordecision: distanceToEndpoint ≤ 25mm → useElbow, else → useTeeaction: createFitting → connectresolve: success → complete, else → showError

selection_inputs.name: ReferencePipe
selection_inputs.prompt: Select REFERENCE pipe (click near endpoint for elbow, mid-pipe for tee)

preprompts: Choosing elbow or tee based on selection...
thinkingsteps: Checking distance to nearest unconnected endpoint...
successprompts: Connected with {FittingType} — selection was {DistanceToEndpoint} from endpoint.
